sentenceTimings.text: In this powerful story, Sarah and Jake face big challenges.
Sarah is a Paralympic snowboarder and a finalist on Dancing with the Stars.
She lost both legs to meningitis.
Jake fought cancer twice and lost one lung.
This is an inspiring story about proving that the impossible is possible.
Imagine being nineteen years old and feeling like you have everything.
Then in less than twenty-four hours, your body turns purple, your lungs collapse, and doctors tell your parents you have two hours to live.
Imagine being thirteen years old and being told you have three months to live.
Then at fifteen, being told you have fourteen days.
Imagine losing both legs, or losing a lung, and being told you can never do the things you love again.
This is the story of two people who proved that the impossible is possible.
Many people believe that when you face a serious medical crisis, your life is over.
They think that losing body parts or function means you can never do the things you love again.
This story proves that belief wrong.
